title: Nishir Daak
subTitle: When Tara starts to worry about sleeping without Shreemoyee, Nishi offers to stay with her. Tara, however, doesn't accept Nishi's offer and says that she should rather sleep alone. Nishi finds it the right opportunity to subdue Tara.

title: Sadhak Bamakhyapa
subTitle: Bamakhyapa, a saint living in the 18th century, is a great devotee of Goddess Tara. Though he is against the unconventional orthodox temple practices, he uses his divine powers to help the needy.

subTitle: Following the cessation of the Kurukshetra War, Lord Krishna arrives in Dwarka to find turmoil and disarray. He then strives to re-establish harmony and faith.

title: Shiv Shakti
subTitle: Swaroopa devises a plan to change Kartikeya's decision and pushes him to visit Kailash. She and other mothers approach Parvati to discuss the plan.

subTitle: Kartikeya stops the Kritikas from being sacrificed to Agni Dev. Devi Swaroopa seeks the blessings of Lord Shiva before leaving Kailash.
